revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-11 12:22:23 on [[Template:External media]]
added small symbol to distinguish it from other templates
switching to the left, mkes it less likely a user clicks on the icon
[[golden ratio]] for image sizes (did some calculating)
changed background because of new image settings

revision.comment: Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for deletion#Template:External media]]. using [[WP:TW|TW]]
converting width to ems, to avoid problems when zooming
general syntax cleanup. should be no change in output, save for italicising the topic line
handle this the way {{infobox artwork}} does it, with a switch
treat images as [[WP:ALT|purely decorative]]. (Someone else should audit the code and maybe use subtemplates—is so much repetition really needed?)
begin cleaning this up on the way to {{infobox}}ing it
adding padding top declaration, so that table doesn't overlap text content
syncing with sandbox: overhaul to convert to [[template:infobox]] and fix several accessibility issues; also adds support for an image
fix the hairy title format detection
track empty calls through [[Category:Pages using the external media template with no first item]]
Fix typo in audio19 icon filename
Proper pluralization in box title for 3D models
Use singular title "External image" if only one image

Changed protection level for "[[Template:External media]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 4000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Moving the title inside the box and reducing the font size from 125% to 115%, per [[Template_talk:External_media#Heading_is_too_big|talk discussion]]
per edit request on talk page - add alt= descriptions for image files
Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using external media with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]
make float=center option actually work after testing in the sandbox
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=External_media here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=External_media for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ infobox
| decat = yes <!-- track empty rows through a separate process -->
| bodystyle      = {{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}} clear: {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|none=both|#default={{{float|right}}} }}; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|left=float:left;margin:0 1.5em 1.5em 0;|center=float:none;margin:auto|none=float:none;margin:0 0 1.5em 1.5em|right|#default=float:right;margin:0 0 1.5em 1.5em}}
| above          = {{{title|{{#if:{{{image1|}}}{{{images|}}}|{{#if:{{{audio1|}}}{{{video1|}}}{{{model1|}}}|External media|External {{#if:{{{image2|}}}{{{images|}}}|images|image}} }}|{{#if:{{{audio1|}}}|{{#if:{{{video1|}}}{{{model1|}}}|External media|External audio}}|{{#if:{{{video1|}}}|{{#if:{{{model1|}}}|External media|External {{#if:{{{video1|}}}|videos|video}}}}|{{#if:{{{model1|}}}|External 3D {{#if:{{{model2|}}}|models|model}} }} }} }} }} }}}
| abovestyle     = font-size:115%
| subheader      = {{{topic|}}}
| subheaderstyle = font-style: italic
| datastyle      = text-align: left
| image          = {{{headerimage|}}}
| caption        = {{{caption|}}}
